Name: 40 Pin 2.54mm Male and Female Pin Headers
Purpose: For connecting modules to the PCB. (btw this one has both male and female headers for almost the same price and umm... its good as i do not have to order both male and female headers separately and its also affordable with free delhivery.)

Name: Micro SD Card Reader Module
Purpose: mainly for storage and adding songs

Name: 3mm Red LED
Purpose: to show that something is wrong in the PCB (robu.in has min order value of 10inr hence the qty is 7)

Name: 3mm Green LED
Purpose: to show that everything works (robu.in has min order value of 10inr hence the qty is 7)

Name: Tactile Push Button Switch 6x6
Purpose: For the switches (btw robu.in has min order value of 10inr so instead of buying 10 individual buttons i got the pack of 10 at almost the same price)

Name: 0.1µF Ceramic Capacitor THT
Purpose: For the decoupling capacitors(robu.in has min order value of 10inr so hence i had to put qty as 10)

Name: 3.7V 2600mAh Li-Ion Battery
Purpose: to provide power. (1 battery is backup)

Name: AMS1117 3.3V SOT223
Purpose: to regulate the voltage. btw robu.in has a minimum order value of 10inr hence i have to order 2 of these.

Name: MAX98357 I2S 3W CLASS D Audio Amplifier Module
Purpose: For audio to convert digital signals to analog while amplifying it.

Name: CP2102(6-pin) USB 2.0 to TTL UART serial converter
Purpose: To program the esp32 wroom32 chip

Name: ESP32-WROOM-32U Wi-Fi BLE Module
Purpose: This is basically the brains of this project it shall run every component.
